clinical_criteria: Discharge disposition ≠ X (XFER HOSPICE MEDICAL FACI)
1 or more documents (NOTE TYPE = CLINIC NOTE) within the last 5 years
2 or more weight measurements in the last 5 years
1 or more height measurements at ≥18 years of age
algorithm_summary: This phenotype algorithm identifies a healthy weight cohort from PCORI data by starting with adults (≥18 years) and applying exclusion criteria to remove deceased patients, patients with unknown sex, and those with hospice care discharge dispositions. It then requires patients to have adequate clinical documentation (clinic notes within 5 years) and anthropometric measurements (multiple weight measurements in 5 years and at least one height measurement since age 18) to ensure sufficient data for weight status assessment.
